.fadeTr-enter-active { transition: opacity 0.3s ease-in 0.1s; }

.fadeTr-leave-active { transition: opacity 0.1s ease-out; }

.fadeTr-enter, .fadeTr-leave-to { opacity: 0; }

.slide-enter-active, .slide-leave-active { transition: 1s; }

.slide-enter, .slide-leave-to { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(30px); }

.dg-backdrop-enter-active { animation: 0.3s ease 0s 1 normal none running dg-fadeIn; }

.dg-backdrop-leave-active { animation: 0.5s ease 0s 1 normal none running dg-fadeOut; }

.dg-fade-enter-active { animation: 0.6s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.58, 1) 0s 1 normal none running dg-fadeIn; }

.dg-fade-leave-active { animation: 0.6s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.58, 1) 0s 1 normal none running dg-fadeOut; }

@-webkit-keyframes dg-fadeIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes dg-fadeIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 1; }
}

@-webkit-keyframes dg-fadeOut { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes dg-fadeOut { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

.dg-zoom-enter-active { animation: 0.3s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.58, 1) 0s 1 normal none running dg-zoomIn; }

.dg-zoom-leave-active { animation: 0.4s cubic-bezier(0, 0, 0.58, 1) 0s 1 normal none running dg-zoomOut; }

@-webkit-keyframes dg-zoomIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
  50% { opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes dg-zoomIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
  50% { opacity: 1; }
}

@-webkit-keyframes dg-zoomOut { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  50% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

@keyframes dg-zoomOut { 
  0% { opacity: 1; }
  50% { opacity: 0; transform: scale3d(0.3, 0.3, 0.3); }
  100% { opacity: 0; }
}

.dg-bounce-enter-active { animation: 0.6s ease 0s 1 normal none running dg-bounceIn; }

.dg-bounce-leave-active { animation: 0.6s ease 0s 1 normal none running dg-zoomOut; }

@-webkit-keyframes dg-bounceIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.3); }
  40% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.06); }
  60% { transform: scale(0.92); }
  100% { transform: scale(1); }
}

@keyframes dg-bounceIn { 
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.3); }
  40% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.06); }
  60% { transform: scale(0.92); }
  100% { transform: scale(1); }
}

@-webkit-keyframes dg-bounceOut { 
  0% { transform: scale(1); }
  25% { transform: scale(0.95); }
  50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.1); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.3); }
}

@keyframes dg-bounceOut { 
  0% { transform: scale(1); }
  25% { transform: scale(0.95); }
  50% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.1); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.3); }
}

.dg-btn-loader { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: absolute; display: flex; -webkit-box-align: center; align-items: center; top: 0px; left: 0px; }

.dg-btn-loader .dg-circles { width: 100%; display: block; text-align: center; }

.dg-btn-loader .dg-circle { width: 0.9em; height: 0.9em; opacity: 0; background-color: rgb(9, 162, 227); display: inline-block; border-radius: 50%; animation-name: dg-circle-oscillation; animation-duration: 0.5875s; animation-iteration-count: infinite; animation-direction: normal; }

.dg-btn-loader .dg-circle:not(:last-child) { margin-right: 8px; }

.dg-btn-loader .dg-circle:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1195s; }

.dg-btn-loader .dg-circle:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2755s; }

.dg-btn-loader .dg-circle:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.3485s; }

@-webkit-keyframes dg-circle-oscillation { 
  0% { }
  50% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { }
}

@keyframes dg-circle-oscillation { 
  0% { }
  50% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { }
}

body.dg-open { width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; }

.dg-container * { box-sizing: border-box; }

.dg-container [disabled] { cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.3; }

.dg-backdrop { background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8); position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 5000; }

.dg-container { width: 100%; height: 100%; position: fixed; top: 0px; left: 0px; z-index: 5000; }

.dg-content-cont { width: 100%; font-family: inherit; }

.dg-main-content { width: 98%; max-width: 400px; padding: 15px; border-radius: 5px; margin: 25px auto; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255); }

.dg-content { font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.3em; }

.dg-title { margin: 0px 0px 10px; padding: 0px; font-size: 18px; }

.dg-content-body { border-bottom: 2px solid rgb(225, 230, 234); padding-bottom: 15px; }

.dg-content-footer { position: relative; padding: 15px 0px 0px; }

.dg-form { background-color: ghostwhite; padding: 10px; margin-bottom: -15px; }

.dg-content-cont--floating { position: absolute; top: 35%; transform: translateY(-70%); margin-top: 0px; }

@media (max-height: 700px) {
  .dg-content-cont--floating { position: relative; top: 10%; transform: none; margin-top: 0px; }
}

.dg-btn { display: inline-block; position: relative; min-width: 80px; padding: 6px 20px; border-radius: 4px; border: 2px solid transparent; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; outline: none; appearance: none; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; }

.dg-btn:focus, .dg-btn:active, .dg-btn:link { outline: none; }

.dg-btn--cancel { color: rgb(254, 254, 254); background-color: rgb(0, 150, 217); }

.dg-btn--ok { color: rgb(0, 150, 217); background-color: rgb(254, 254, 254); border-color: rgb(0, 150, 217); }

.dg-pull-right { float: right; }

.dg-btn.dg-btn--loading .dg-btn-content { visibility: hidden; }

.dg-clear::before { content: " "; display: block; clear: both; }

.dg-content-body--has-title .dg-content { font-size: 14px; }

.dg-container--has-input .dg-main-content { max-width: 450px; }

.dg-container--has-input .dg-content { margin-bottom: 15px; }

.dg-container--has-input .dg-content-body { border-bottom: none; }

.dg-container--has-input .dg-form { border-top: 1px solid rgb(225, 230, 234); border-right: 1px solid rgb(225, 230, 234); border-left: 1px solid rgb(225, 230, 234); border-image: initial; border-bottom: none; border-top-left-radius: 4px; border-top-right-radius: 4px; }

.dg-container--has-input .dg-content-footer { background-color: ghostwhite; border-right: 1px solid rgb(225, 230, 234); border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(225, 230, 234); border-left: 1px solid rgb(225, 230, 234); border-image: initial; border-top: none; border-bottom-left-radius: 4px; border-bottom-right-radius: 4px; padding: 0px 10px 10px; }

.dg-container .dg-highlight-1 { color: rgb(255, 140, 0); font-weight: bold; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(43, 165, 255); }

.dg-container .dg-highlight-2 { color: rgb(43, 165, 255); font-weight: bold; border-bottom: 1px solid rgb(255, 140, 0); }</style><style rel="stylesheet" type="text/css">@charset "utf-8";

.sbx-custom { display: inline-block; position: relative; width: 250px; height: 36px; white-space: nowrap; box-sizing: border-box; }

.sbx-custom__wrapper { width: 100%; height: 100%; }

.sbx-custom__input { display: inline-block; transition: box-shadow 0.4s, background 0.4s; border: 0px; border-radius: 6px; box-shadow: rgb(255, 255, 255) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); padding: 0px 29px 0px 36px; width: 100%; height: 100%; vertical-align: middle; white-space: normal; font-size: inherit; appearance: none; }

.sbx-custom__input::-webkit-search-decoration, .sbx-custom__input::-webkit-search-cancel-button, .sbx-custom__input::-webkit-search-results-button, .sbx-custom__input::-webkit-search-results-decoration { display: none; }

.sbx-custom__input:hover { box-shadow: rgb(230, 230, 230) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset; }

.sbx-custom__input:focus, .sbx-custom__input:active { outline: 0px; box-shadow: rgb(238, 238, 238) 0px 0px 0px 1px inset; background: rgb(255, 255, 255); }

.sbx-custom__input::-webkit-input-placeholder { color: rgb(187, 187, 187); }

.sbx-custom__input::placeholder { color: rgb(187, 187, 187); }

.sbx-custom__submit { position: absolute; top: 0px; right: inherit; left: 0px; margin: 0px; border: 0px; border-radius: 5px 0px 0px 5px; background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0); padding: 0px; width: 45px; height: 100%; vertical-align: middle; text-align: center; font-size: inherit; user-select: none; }

.sbx-custom__submit::before { display: inline-block; margin-right: -4px; height: 100%; vertical-align: middle; content: ""; }

.sbx-custom__submit:hover, .sbx-custom__submit:active { cursor: pointer; }

.sbx-custom__submit:focus { outline: 0px; }

.sbx-custom__submit svg { width: 21px; height: 21px; vertical-align: middle; fill: rgb(204, 204, 204); }

.sbx-custom__reset { display: none; position: absolute; top: 4.5px; right: 4.5px; margin: 0px; border: 0px; background: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 0px; font-size: inherit; user-select: none; fill: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5); }

.sbx-custom__reset:focus { outline: 0px; }

.sbx-custom__reset svg { display: block; margin: 4px; width: 19px; height: 19px; }

.sbx-custom__input:valid ~ .sbx-custom__reset { display: block; animation-name: sbx-reset-in; animation-duration: 0.15s; }

.sbx-custom__reset { background: rgb(238, 238, 238); }

@-webkit-keyframes sbx-reset-in { 
  0% { transform: translate3d(-20%, 0px, 0px); opacity: 0; }
  100% { transform: none; opacity: 1; }
}

@keyframes sbx-reset-in {

  100% { transform: none; opacity: 1; }
